title: Seebeck Thermoelectric Chemical Gradient Energy Logger
description: Harvests and characterises thermoelectric energy from a sustained chemical temperature gradient. A Peltier module operated in reverse (TEG mode) bridges the hot side of an exothermic chemical reaction vessel and a water-cooled cold plate. An MT3608 MPPT boost converter maximises power extraction. Arduino monitors hot/cold temperatures via two DS18B20 probes, TEG open-circuit voltage, and boost converter output, computing Seebeck coefficient and instantaneous power. All data logged to SD card.
objective: Measure Seebeck coefficient S (μV/K), instantaneous power P (mW), and cumulative harvested energy (mWh) from a chemical temperature gradient over a 2-hour experiment.
constraints: Arduino Uno, two DS18B20, Peltier TEC1-12706 as TEG, MT3608 boost, SD logger; ΔT range 10–60 °C; max hot-side temperature 85 °C; no corrosive fluids on TEG surface.
supporting_fact_titles: Seebeck Effect and Thermoelectric Power Generation
design_element_titles: Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver
TEG Module with MPPT Boost Converter

element_usage_notes.DS18B20 1-Wire Temperature Probe Array: Two probes: one on TEG hot face (reaction vessel side), one on TEG cold face (heat sink side).
element_usage_notes.Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver: Operated with H-bridge disabled — module used passively as TEG; H-bridge wiring not energised.
element_usage_notes.TEG Module with MPPT Boost Converter: Boost converter extracts power at MPPT voltage (50 % Voc); output charges LiPo buffer.
element_usage_notes.SD Card Data Logger Module: Logs t, Th, Tc, ΔT, Voc, Seebeck coefficient S, power P_mW, cumulative energy mWh every 10 s.

element_interactions.to: TEG Module with MPPT Boost Converter
element_interactions.description: ΔT drives Seebeck EMF; used to compute expected Voc for MPPT voltage reference

element_interactions.from: TEG Module with MPPT Boost Converter
element_interactions.description: Open-circuit voltage and harvested power logged for Seebeck coefficient computation
Hot and cold face temperatures logged every cycle

element_interactions.from: Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver
element_interactions.to: TEG Module with MPPT Boost Converter
element_interactions.description: TEC module body conducts temperature gradient from hot reaction side to TEG terminals
